column7: Boosts spikelet number per panicle; N at PI stage is critical for yield expression.
Stimulates early root and shoot development; supports high spikelet number potential.
Boosts spikelet grain weight through improved N-S nutrition; apply at active tillering.
Reduces spikelet sterility; potassium improves pollen viability and fertilization success.
Supports large panicle development; micronutrient package addresses hidden hunger in high-yield paddy soils.
Algae and bacterial consortia improve soil health; nano-NPK supports spikelet development and grain filling.

Biological N reduces mineral fertilizer dependence; Azolla organic matter improves soil health for high-yield production.
Rapid foliar uptake supports large panicle development; NPK spray at heading reduces spikelet sterility percentage.
